emails.subject: Your [Lead Magnet Name] is ready
emails.preview_text: Download link inside + quick tip to get the most from it
emails.body:
Here's your download:

[DOWNLOAD LINK]

Quick tip: Don't just save this. Use it today.

Most people download resources and never open them. Be different.

Pick ONE thing from the guide and implement it in the next 24 hours. That's how you actually get results.

I'll check in tomorrow with a specific action step.

[Name]

emails.subject: Did you try it yet?
emails.preview_text: Here's exactly what to do first
emails.body:
Quick check-in.

If you downloaded the [Lead Magnet Name] but haven't used it yet, here's your action step:

**Do this in the next 15 minutes:**
1. Open the guide
2. Go to page [X]
3. Complete the [specific exercise/template]

That's it. 15 minutes.

People who take action in the first 48 hours are 10x more likely to see results. Don't be the person who collects resources but never uses them.

Reply and tell me when you've done it.

[Name]

emails.subject: The next step (when you're ready)
emails.body:
You've had the [Lead Magnet Name] for a few days.

If you've used it, you've probably noticed [common insight/result].

Here's the next level:

[PRODUCT/SERVICE SOFT PITCH]

This isn't for everyone. Only makes sense if:
- You've completed the basics from the guide
- You want to [specific outcome]
- You're ready to invest [time/money] in faster results

If that's you: [CTA LINK]

If not, no worries. Keep using the free guide. It works.

Either way, reply if you have questions. I read everything.

[Name]
